rule_metadata.name: NLBrute
rule_metadata.author: @bartblaze
rule_metadata.description: Identifies NLBrute, an RDP brute-forcing tool.

rules.rule_text:
rule NLBrute
{
	meta:
		id = "6b1itE1MIciily5r3hEAlg"
		fingerprint = "b303f9469c58c3c8417b5825ba949adf7032192a9f29cc8346b90636dd2ca7b5"
		version = "1.0"
		creation_date = "2020-08-01"
		first_imported = "2021-12-30"
		last_modified = "2021-12-30"
		status = "RELEASED"
		sharing = "TLP:CLEAR"
		source = "BARTBLAZE"
		author = "@bartblaze"
		description = "Identifies NLBrute, an RDP brute-forcing tool."
		category = "MALWARE"
		malware_type = "HACKTOOL"

	strings:
		$ = "SERVER:PORT@DOMAIN\\USER;PASSWORD" ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
